title: 8 Things a Godly Man Is Ruthless With
caption:
8 things a godly man is ruthless with. And gentle with in everyone else.

He holds himself to the standard he'd never dare put on a struggling friend. Grace and truth, not one instead of the other (John 1:14).

#faith #humility #grace #christianman #godlyman
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
